items.title: Clean Stage Directions

items.title: Character QA Checklist

tutorials.title: Context Notes For Better Continuity
tutorials.content: Use compact context notes for stable facts: relationship state, current location, unresolved promises, and active objects. Keep each note short, update it after major scene turns, and remove stale facts before they start competing with newer narration. Example key: `current_scene_anchor`.

tutorials.title: Testing Regex Scripts Safely
tutorials.content: Clone your active preset first, test on a short chat, and keep before/after samples. Prefer narrow patterns over broad cleanup rules, especially when a character uses brackets or markdown intentionally.
